suggestions.suggestion: The noiseLattice generator should use the existing createPRNG for displacement rather than Math.sin alone, to ensure true volumetric randomness and determinism. The plan says 'sine-based displacement' — clarify this means seeded-noise-modulated displacement so all points aren't locked to a predictable sine grid.

The current init() generates colors (hue from palette), sizes, aHueOffset, and aRandom attributes alongside positions. Ensure the refactor only extracts position generation to the generator module while leaving attribute generation in pointCloud.ts, since color/size depend on VisualParams not available to a pure geometry generator.

notes: Plan aligns well with codebase. pointCloud.ts lines 71-113 contain the inline shell/interior generation loop that will be replaced. The existing PRNG (mulberry32 via createPRNG) and test infrastructure (vitest with 20 existing pointCloud tests) are ready. The generators/ directory does not exist yet and must be created. The five generator types match the ticket's allowed list exactly. Step ordering is correct — generator module first, tests second, integration third, regression tests fourth, build verification last.
